query:
SELECT
                $1::text AS "name!",
                (
                    SELECT scheduled_at
                    FROM pgqueue.jobs
                    WHERE queue = $1 AND status = 'queued' AND scheduled_at <= now()
                    ORDER BY scheduled_at, id
                    LIMIT 1
                ) AS oldest_ready_at,
                (
                    SELECT scheduled_at
                    FROM pgqueue.jobs
                    WHERE queue = $1 AND status = 'queued' AND scheduled_at > now()
                    ORDER BY scheduled_at, id
                    LIMIT 1
                ) AS next_scheduled_at,
                CASE
                    WHEN EXISTS (
                        SELECT 1 FROM pgqueue.jobs
                        WHERE queue = $1 AND status = 'running'
                        LIMIT 1
                    ) THEN 'running'
                    WHEN EXISTS (
                        SELECT 1 FROM pgqueue.jobs
                        WHERE queue = $1 AND status = 'aborting'
                        LIMIT 1
                    ) THEN 'aborting'
                    ELSE 'idle'
                END AS "execution!",
                EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1 FROM pgqueue.workers
                    WHERE queue = $1 AND expires_at > now()
                    LIMIT 1
                ) AS "has_live_workers!",
                (
                    SELECT completed_at
                    FROM pgqueue.jobs
                    WHERE queue = $1 AND status = 'failed'
                    ORDER BY completed_at DESC, id DESC
                    LIMIT 1
                ) AS latest_failure_at
